title: Software Engineer III, ITC
description:
**Who You'll Work With**
 You will report to the Senior Engineering Manager— the enterprise team that curates, governs, and serves Nike Direct and Marketplace data products to BI Experience teams and other GT domains. You will be a senior individual contributor on the squad, working alongside Leads and Principal engineers to deliver complex backend and data systems. You will mentor SWE I and SWE II engineers, drive technical design within your squad, and influence patterns and standards that cross\\-squad teams adopt.
   

  

**Who We Are Looking For**
 We are looking for senior engineers who own outcomes end\\-to\\-end — engineers who can decompose ambiguous problems, drive high\\-quality designs, and ship complex systems with minimal oversight.
   

  

* A minimum of 5–8 years of backend and/or data engineering experience.
* Strong expertise in at least one of Java, Python, or Scala, and confident fluency in SQL and data modeling.
* Proven experience designing and shipping production microservices, RESTful APIs, and event\\-driven systems.
* Hands\\-on experience with modern data platforms — Databricks, Spark, Delta Lake, Unity Catalog (or equivalent) — and orchestration tools such as Airflow.
* Solid cloud experience (AWS, GCP, or Azure) including IAM, secrets, networking, and cost\\-aware design.
* Experience leading non\\-trivial technical designs, writing design documents, and driving them through review with peers.
* Demonstrated ability to mentor junior engineers — code reviews, pairing, and design coaching.
* Experience with distributed messaging (Kafka, SQS), caching (Redis), and search (Elasticsearch/OpenSearch) where relevant.
* Strong test\\-driven development discipline, including productive use of AI tools like GitHub Copilot.
* Experience with CI/CD, observability (metrics/tracing/alerting), and incident response.
* Excellent written and verbal communication; able to influence both engineers and senior product/business partners.
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, or related field — or equivalent experience.
* Preferred: experience with data governance, RLS/ABAC, ontology/semantic layers, dbt, agentic/LLM\\-powered analytics layers, or large\\-scale BI platforms.


**What You'll Work On**
 As a Software Engineer III in Marketplace Data Engineering, you will own meaningful slices of our data products, APIs, and pipelines — and influence how the broader team builds.
   

  

* You will lead the design and delivery of significant backend and data services that serve Marketplace and Nike Direct data to BI Experience teams and enterprise consumers.
* You will drive technical design reviews within your squad — choosing patterns, defining contracts, and trading off scope, complexity, and timeline with product partners.
* You will raise the engineering bar through high\\-leverage code reviews, pairing, and authoring patterns and blueprints that other squads adopt.
* You will own production reliability and operational quality of the services you build — leading on\\-call, capacity planning, and post\\-incident learning.
* You will mentor SWE I and SWE II engineers on the squad and contribute to their growth through career and skills coaching.
* You will partner with the Platform team to adopt recommended toolkits and contribute back improvements when patterns fall short of our needs.
* You will collaborate with globally distributed engineering teams and represent your squad in cross\\-org technical forums.

* Validate integrations and data flows between systems such as ERP, OMS, WMS, Planning tools, and Finance platforms (REST APIs, events, batch jobs).
* Participate in feature delivery, production validation, and post deployment support as needed.

 This role spans data engineering and core infrastructure. As a Member of Technical Staff, you will build and maintain the data platform that supports our research and trading, along with the cloud infrastructure the firm runs on.
 



  





 You will work directly with researchers and engineers across the firm. The work requires care with data correctness and a high standard for reliability. Strong candidates own systems end\\-to\\-end, communicate clearly, and pay close attention to detail.
 



  





**What You'll Do** 



* Design, build, and maintain pipelines that ingest, validate, and curate datasets from external vendors

**What We're Looking For** 



* 3–7 years of experience as a data engineer, infrastructure engineer, platform engineer, or software engineer building production systems

* Strong communication skills, analytical ability, and attention to detail



  





**Nice to Have**

**How We Work** 




 We six days a week, interfacing with colleagues across Hong Kong and New York. We are an early\\-stage firm: the pace is fast, standards are high, and everyone is close to the work.  This role will lead the end‑to‑end design, development, and delivery of scalable enterprise solutions across Microsoft Dynamics 365 Customer Engagement and Finance \\& Operations. Responsibilities span multiple modules, including Finance, Supply Chain Management, Project Operations and Commerce. The Solution Architect will be accountable for designing, building, and implementing complex solutions that integrate seamlessly across these Dynamics 365 applications, ensuring scalability, performance, and business value.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities Include**
* Enterprise Architecture Leadership
* Define and own the end‑to‑end architecture for Dynamics 365 Finance \\& Operations across Finance, Supply Chain, Retail \\& Commerce and Project Operations
* Translate complex business requirements into scalable, secure, and high‑performing ERP solutions that align with organizational goals.


 Collaborate with architects, business analysts, and other engineers on technical strategy and ensure alignment with business goals and product roadmap.
   

  

* Development \\& Customization
* Lead X\\+\\+ development, extensions, and upgrade‑safe customizations.
* Establish and maintain coding standards (X\\+\\+, C\\#), ALM processes, and code review guidelines to ensure quality and consistency.
* Oversee configuration, customization, and extensions using Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI).
* Integration Design \\& Delivery
* Design and implement integrations with CE, third‑party systems, and legacy applications using OData, APIs, and Azure services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Data Factory).
* Collaborate with functional consultants, project managers, and vendor partners to align solutions with business needs.
* Data, Security \\& Compliance
* Support data migration strategies, security role design, and compliance requirements.
* Conduct design reviews, solution validation, and ensure adherence to Microsoft standards.
* Reusable Assets \\& Frameworks
* Develop reusable templates, frameworks, and accelerators to standardize solution delivery.
* Conduct detailed workshops with business stakeholders to map requirements to native functionality or identify necessary customizations.
* DevOps \\& Release Management
* Manage DevOps pipelines, CI/CD, and environment strategies for F\\&O projects.
* Oversee Lifecycle Services (LCS) and Power Platform Admin Center (PPAC), managing code branches, build pipelines, and releases across Dev/UAT/Prod environments.


* Effective Communications
* Translate technical requirements from Dynamics 365 F\\&O (Mandatory) and CE(Optional) into clear, business‑friendly language.
* Lead workshops, demos, and discussions with finance, supply chain, sales, service, marketing, IT, and dealer stakeholders.
* Present and negotiate effectively to align different teams and priorities.
* Work collaboratively to build consensus and drive adoption across departments.
* Innovation \\& Continuous Improvement
* Stay current with Microsoft technologies and industry trends to inform strategic decisions.
* Ensure adherence to best practices in software engineering, DevOps, and solution governance.


**What You Will Have**
**Software Development**
* Deep hands on experience with Dynamics 365 F\\&O modules (Finance, Supply Chain, Project Operations), with a proven track record of leading large scale enterprise software projects.
* Expert level knowledge of X\\+\\+ and .NET (C\\#), with deep understanding of D365 F\\&O layered architecture, Data Entities, and OData/REST APIs.
* Provides consulting on developer workbench tools and upgrade safe customizations.
* Performance tuning expertise to optimize batch jobs, queries, and custom code.


**Software Development Life Cycle**
* Describes similarities and differences between life cycle for new product development vs. new release.
* Works with formal life cycle methodologies, Agile/Scrum practices, SAFe PI planning, and performance tuning strategies.
* Interprets product development plans and functional documentation, ensuring alignment with business goals.


**Software Integration Engineering**
* Skilled in integration strategies between F\\&O, CE, third party apps, and legacy systems.
* Designs and implements data exchange interfaces using OData, REST APIs, DMF, and Azure services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Data Factory, API Management).
* Experienced with Common Data Services (Dual Write) for integration with Dynamics 365 Sales, Field Service, and Project Operations.
* Describes tools and techniques for extraction, transformation, and loading (ETL) of electronic data.
* Works with integrating software into customer or partner frameworks and infrastructures.


**Software Product Design / Architecture**
* Deep understanding of software architecture, design patterns, agile methodologies, and performance optimization.
* Provides guidance to implementation teams on strategic areas such as ALM, environment strategy, integration strategy, data migration strategy, and security strategy.
* Analyzes benefits and drawbacks of specific software designs and architectural alternatives.


**DevOps \\& Release Management**
* Expertise in Azure DevOps: Git, pipelines, CI/CD, release management, and test plans.
* Oversees Lifecycle Services (LCS) and Power Platform Admin Center (PPAC), managing code branches, build pipelines, and releases across Dev/UAT/Prod environments.
* Skilled in environment management, monitoring release dependencies, and ensuring compliance with Microsoft standards.
* Working knowledge of Azure tenant and environment management, with experience in dealing with ISVs and IPs.


**Data \\& AI Solutions**
* Proficiency in SQL Server Management Studio and data migration tools (DMF).
* Ability to design and deliver AI powered ERP solutions using Copilot Studio and AI Builder.
* Practical experience with Power Platform (Power Apps, Power Automate, Power BI) and Azure services (Logic Apps, Service Bus, Functions, Key Vault).
* Extensive experience with data architecture, solution frameworks, and reusable accelerators.


**Considerations for Top Candidates**
* Enterprise Project Delivery – Proven track record of contributing to large‑scale enterprise ERP implementations, ensuring upgrade‑safe customizations and technical excellence.
* Software Architecture \\& Design – Deep understanding of layered architecture, design patterns, and Agile methodologies applied to Dynamics 365 F\\&O development.
* Dynamics 365 F\\&O Mastery – Expert‑level experience in X\\+\\+ development, SSRS reporting, and customization frameworks across Finance and Supply Chain modules.
* Microsoft Development Stack – Advanced proficiency in .NET/C\\#, enabling seamless extension of F\\&O functionality and integration with external applications.
* Power Platform Integration – Expert‑level experience embedding Power Apps, Power Automate, and Power BI into F\\&O solutions to extend ERP capabilities.
* DevOps \\& Microservices – Strong expertise in Azure DevOps pipelines, CI/CD, Git branching strategies, and Azure microservices for scalable ERP delivery.
* Microsoft Fabric \\& Middleware – Extensive experience leveraging Microsoft Fabric and other middleware platforms for integration, data orchestration, and advanced reporting.
* Data \\& Solution Architecture – Skilled in designing data migration strategies, integration frameworks, and reusable accelerators for ERP projects.
* Programming \\& Database Skills – Extensive experience with JavaScript and SQL for extending ERP solutions and optimizing database performance.
* Cloud \\& Environment Management – Working knowledge of Azure tenant administration, environment management, and monitoring release dependencies.
* Integration Development – Hands‑on experience building APIs, managing authentication flows, and ensuring secure data exchange between F\\&O and external systems.
* Industry Experience – Exposure to Dealer and Rental industry processes, with ability to tailor ERP solutions to industry‑specific requirements.
* Dual Write \\& CE Integration – Experience working with Common Data Services (Dual Write) to integrate F\\&O with Dynamics 365 Sales, Field Service, and Project Operations, including collaboration with ISVs and IPs.
* Agile Certifications (Optional) – Certified in SAFe Product Owner/Product Manager (POPM) and Certified Scrum Professional – Product Owner (CSP PO).
* Test Automation Expertise – Extensive experience with modern testing frameworks for Dynamics 365 F\\&O applications. Preferred exposure to Leapwork, Azure App Testing, Playwright, with accepted proficiency in JMeter, Ranorex, Selenium, or equivalent platforms to validate customizations, integrations, and performance across Finance, Supply Chain, Retail \\& Commerce and Project Operations modules.


**Experience**
* 15–17\\+ years of demonstrated work experience in ERP technologies with 10\\+ years in Dynamics 365 CE/CRM
* Proven track record as Technical Lead / Solution Architect in 10\\+ full cycle F\\&O implementations.
* Experience with Agile/Scrum/SAFe methodologies, PI planning, and DevOps practices.
* Exposure to global rollouts, multi entity implementations, and regulatory compliance.


**Certifications (Preferred)**
* MB 700: Dynamics 365 Finance \\& Operations Solution Architect Expert
* MB 500: Finance \\& Operations Apps Developer
* PL 600: Microsoft Power Platform Solution Architect


**Additional Details**
 Ability to travel up to 20% \\- typically to Cat Digital hubs and/or Dealers in various regions
   

  

**Posting Dates**
 June 23, 2026 \\- July 13, 2026
   

  

 Caterpillar is an Equal Opportunity Employer. Qualified applicants of any age are encouraged to apply
